provenance.fan_asset_legal_status: NOT FOR DISTRIBUTION - internal development only
provenance.legal_review: NOT COMPLETE - requires manual legal assessment before any public release
provenance.notes: This is a Star Wars fan model. IP rights belong to Lucasfilm Ltd. / Disney. This asset is intended for private game development only and must not be distributed, published, or included in any public release without explicit legal permission from Disney/Lucasfilm.

import_workflow.step_1_inspect: Drag GLB into Blender, verify silhouette and poly count
import_workflow.step_2_normalize_scale: In Unity, set FBX Scale Factor to 1.0 (infantry ~1.2 Unity units tall)
import_workflow.step_3_create_material: URP Lit material with white (#F5F5F5) base, black (#000000) accents
import_workflow.step_4_add_textures: If textured in source, apply or bake to single 512x512 or 1024x1024 atlas
import_workflow.step_5_create_prefab: Instantiate in scene, apply material, add weapon/accessory slots as children
import_workflow.step_7_validate: Run pack validator to ensure references match manifest.yaml

quality_checklist.animation_ready: ✗ No rig - static or requires setup

next_steps: Download GLB from Sketchfab (manual step - requires account)
Import into Unity project matching DINO's asset structure
Normalize materials to warfare-starwars color palette
Test in-engine with warfare-starwars faction preview
Document any required Blender adjustments for future contributors
